title: Sanji Faces the Vinsmokes
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Nami, Luffy as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Sanji is forced back into the Vinsmoke family’s control, revealing the cruelty behind his royal bloodline.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once every six months in this dream- like nation,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Each of its individual citizens are asked one question in particular.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The question is straight- forward: leave...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They keep multiplying... and they're all making those weird animal sounds!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you guys... just what in the world happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This one's talking just like the original!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'B... do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do do

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been busting my behind looking for you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And how do you thank me? By ambushing, then snatching, then tying me up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have to admit, this is beyond strange... and you're right, she the spitting image of me from head to toe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This wouldn't even be an issue if the real individuals were just mixed in along with this sea of imposters you found.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a sec... then this means you guys didn't purposely multiply just for fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Geez... you continue to reach brand new heights of Idiocy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You! You should have an inkling as to what's been going on, shouldn't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I mean, you were just quietly sitting back and watching as this Ambush unfolded!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have a good excuse though... I can't move!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We were attacked by you, Luffy!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 44 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
